gates: $p='docs/rbac-skill/AIGC 中台 · V2标准详图（样板）.md'; $lines=Get-Content -LiteralPath $p -Encoding UTF8; $fences=($lines | Select-String -Pattern '^```').Count; $subs=($lines | Select-String -Pattern '^\s*subgraph\b').Count; $ends=($lines | Select-String -Pattern '^\s*end\s*$').Count; if($fences -ne 2 -or $subs -ne $ends){ throw "bad mermaid balance fences=$fences subgraphs=$subs ends=$ends" }

$p='docs/rbac-skill/AIGC 中台 · V2标准详图（样板）.md'; foreach($m in 'Model Datasource / Field Binding','Output Schema','Provider KeyRef / SecretRef','Retrieval Policy','Citation Policy','Trace Evidence','AigcCapability','FLOW_PUBLISH_GATE -.④'){ if(-not (Select-String -LiteralPath $p -Pattern $m -SimpleMatch -Quiet)){ throw ('missing '+$m+' in '+$p) } }
node agent-loop/src/check-mojibake.js {{taskFile}} docs/rbac-skill/AIGC 中台 · V2标准详图（样板）.md
